text:
(01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: A beneficiary’s Maintenance Assistance Status and Basis of Eligibility (MASBOE) group. This is a three-
character designation, where the first character indicates the beneficiary’s Maintenance Assistance 
Status (MAS), e.g., “medically needy”, and the second and third positions indicate their Basis of 
Eligibility (BOE), e.g., “aged”; in the month. There are separate variables for each of the 12 months 
during the year. 

SHORT NAME: MASBOE_CD_01 
MASBOE_CD_02
